{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eye
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye]] is an artifact that points to distant locations.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Harmony]] shoved the [[Eye]] into a cage.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye]] is a [[construct]] that can speak.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
